title: Gemini 2.2 announced
description: Google announced Gemini 2.2 with improved agentic planning and multimodal performance.

title: AI Studio workflow upgrades
description: Google AI Studio added reusable workflow templates and evaluation runs for Gemini applications.

title: Gemma 3 family release
description: Google released Gemma 3 checkpoints with improved instruction tuning and multilingual quality.

title: Gemini enterprise controls expanded
description: Google expanded admin controls, data handling policy options, and deployment governance for Gemini enterprise usage.
